mapper.insert: insert into aiw_investment_theme_snapshot (biz_id, task_code, snapshot_type, theme_code, theme_name, window_minutes, sample_count, return_rate, momentum_score, heat_score, top_product_biz_id, metrics, snapshot_time, created_at) values (#{bizId}, #{taskCode}, #{snapshotType}, #{themeCode}, #{themeName}, #{windowMinutes}, #{sampleCount}, #{returnRate}, #{momentumScore}, #{heatScore}, #{topProductBizId}, #{metrics}, #{snapshotTime}, #{createdAt})
